thought.text: 我会记录完成状态并检查修改文件。

task_list.title: Inspect task1 lexer framework and scoring setup
task_list.notes: ANTLR selected; current main leaves Loc and flags unset; grammar has minimal tokens.

task_list.title: Run current task1 score for baseline
task_list.notes: Baseline score 17.64/100; missing many operators and all locations/flags.

task_list.title: Implement missing lexer behavior
task_list.notes: Replaced task1 antlr main with self-contained scanner handling line markers, flags, keywords, constants, operators, comments.

task_list.title: Verify against score and sample outputs
task_list.notes: task1-score reports 100.00/100.00 across all listed cases.
